summary: Faster disk scans with tiered fast mode, live AI chat streaming, and clearer scan progress.
introduced: New Session button to clear chat history and start a fresh conversation
Verbose scan progress showing sizing vs indexing steps and current folder
changed: Fast scan sizes system folders (Applications, Library, private) in one step instead of walking every file
AI replies render Markdown (bold text and bullet lists) instead of raw syntax
Responses stream token-by-token from Apple Intelligence and Ollama
Heavy user Library folders (Containers, Caches, Developer) are sized in one step during fast scans
fixed: Macintosh HD scans no longer estimate 9+ hours at 1% when Full Disk Access is missing
Removed accidental 1.0.0 test release from Sparkle update feeds
